product_overview: AiTut is an AI-powered language learning web platform where users practice by chatting with an AI tutor, receive translation and grammar corrections, and follow a personalized onboarding based on CEFR levels and language preferences.
core_goals: Provide a stable, low-latency AI chat experience for language practice
Onboard new users with language preferences and CEFR level to personalize content
Enable secure user registration and login with plan selection and Paddle payment integration
Offer profile management and a dashboard that routes users to the chat and learning content
Support admin-managed content (blogs, pages, documents) and plan-based access control

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Create a new account with name, email and password, then select a plan and proceed into onboarding/dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /en/register -> Fill name input field -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click submit/continue button -> Select a plan (base, middle, or ultra) -> Click to proceed to dashboard -> See /en/onboarding

Navigate to /en/register -> Fill name input field -> Fill email input field with an email already in use -> Fill password input field -> Click submit/continue button -> See validation error 'email already in use' -> Remain on /en/register

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate with email and password to access protected areas (dashboard, chat, profile).
user_flows: Navigate to /en/login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Sign In button to submit -> See /en/dashboard

Navigate to /en/login -> Fill email input field with invalid credentials -> Fill password input field -> Click Sign In button to submit -> See error message on invalid credentials -> Remain on /en/login

features.name: Onboarding (Language Preferences)
features.description: Collect native language, target language and CEFR level to tailor AI responses and content complexity.
user_flows: Navigate to /en/onboarding -> Select native language -> Select target language -> Select CEFR level -> Click Continue/Save -> See /en/dashboard
Navigate to /en/onboarding -> Leave target language unselected -> Click Continue/Save -> See validation error 'Please select a target language' -> Remain on /en/onboarding

features.name: AI Chat
features.description: Start or continue conversations with the AI tutor; receive answers that include translation and grammar corrections and have conversations saved to history.
user_flows: Navigate to /en/chat -> See conversation list and New Conversation control -> Click New Conversation -> Type message in message input -> Click Send -> See AI response containing translation and correction -> Conversation saved to history
Navigate to /en/chat -> Type message in message input -> Click Send repeatedly until limit reached -> See rate limit error '30 messages/min' -> Message not sent

features.name: Dashboard Access
features.description: Landing area after login or onboarding providing quick access to chat, profile and learning content.
user_flows: Navigate to /en/dashboard -> See dashboard summary and quick links to Chat and Profile -> Click Chat link -> Redirect to /en/chat
Navigate to /en/dashboard with expired session -> See redirect to /en/login or access denied message -> Click Sign In button to go to /en/login

features.name: Profile Management
features.description: View and update account details and language preferences (name, native/target language, CEFR level).
user_flows: Navigate to /en/profile -> See profile fields pre-filled -> Click Edit -> Fill name input field -> Update native language and target language -> Click Save -> See success confirmation and updated fields
Navigate to /en/profile -> Click Edit -> Enter invalid email format in email field -> Click Save -> See validation error for email -> Remain on /en/profile

features.name: Plan & Payment (Paddle)
features.description: Select or upgrade a subscription plan; integrate Paddle checkout and update plan status upon successful payment.
user_flows: Navigate to /en/dashboard -> Click Upgrade or Select Plan -> Select plan option -> Start Paddle checkout -> Complete Paddle checkout -> See plan active in profile or dashboard

Navigate to /en/dashboard -> Click Upgrade or Select Plan -> Select plan option -> Start Paddle checkout -> Encounter payment failure or cancel -> See payment error message -> Return to plan selection

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Register with name, email, password. After registration, user selects a plan and can proceed to dashboard.
user_interactions: Select a plan (base, middle, or ultra)

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials
user_interactions: Click Sign In button to submit
See error message on invalid credentials
